notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Pete Alonso out at 2nd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Coby Mayo batting, Weston Wilson picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Michael Massey.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser grounds into a double play, first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Samuel Basallo out at 2nd. Colton Cowser out at 1st.
